finding_results.notes: Retained one refusal cycle at the fish-table testimony request, then replaced the repeated refusal loop with a new consequence beat (witness exposure + storm clock) that drives directly into the map handoff.

Replaced abstract summary with concrete coercive act and immediate dispossession outcome, then had Lena explicitly connect that act to present-day recoverable artifacts at the icehouse before Otis exits.
Kept the single retained impact-template line and avoided introducing any additional 'felt/landed/settled ... like ...' constructions in the chapter.

Rewrote Lena's confidentiality offer into spoken, high-pressure local register with contraction ("We'll") and plain phrasing; removed memo/legal diction while preserving Otis's interruption beat immediately after.
Replaced four repeated tighten-formula stress cues with distinct physical/sensory reactions and retained a single tighten marker for Otis under pressure.
Inserted Lena interior access beats in the opening run before the preexisting interior return, preventing external-camera drift.

Adjusted the trust-negotiation exchange so Lena's misstep lands as natural pressured speech rather than bureaucratic language, while keeping scene leverage and interruption dynamics intact.
